title: App hosted on monday.com, does any change required for migration to 2023-10 version
excerpt:
Hi, 
I have one query, in migration guide of 2023-10 it is written that “Migrate apps to use the API correctly”, so we are using monday.com platform only so any change required in app here from our end? 
Reference link: 
…

posts.author: Yash (Yash Chaudhari)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have one query, in migration guide of 2023-10 it is written that “Migrate apps to use the API correctly”, so we are using monday.com platform only so any change required in app here from our end?

Reference link:

monday API docs

Migration guide - 2023-10

A guide to help developers migrate to monday API version 2023-10

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Yash,

I am not sure I understand the question, but if you are not using the API, and you are only using monday’s platform from monday’s UI, then you do not need to do anything.

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Yash (Yash Chaudhari)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Matias.Monday I was using 2023-07 version GraphQL API till now, so I need to use the latest 2023-10 version GraphQL API so what will be the changes required from application/UI point here?

Below is my hosted app on Monday platform.

image1884×733 85.2 KB

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Yash,

Nothing is needed on the UI side of it.

The changes affect only the use of the API.

If you are using the API in any way, you need to adapt your script as instructed in the guide. That is all that needs to be done.

Cheers,
Matias
